fields.name: Verb
fields.description: Infinitive of the target French verb.

fields.name: VerbIPA
fields.description: Broad modern Parisian / standard metropolitan French IPA for the infinitive.

fields.name: Meaning
fields.description: Compact core English meaning.

fields.name: Regularity
fields.description: One of: regular / irregular / semi-irregular.

fields.name: VerbGroup
fields.description: One of: -er / -ir / -re / irregular family / other.

fields.name: PatternRule
fields.description: Concise conjugation rule or pattern.

fields.name: StemChangeNote
fields.description: Concise stem alternation note if relevant.

fields.name: IrregularityNote
fields.description: Concise warning for unusual forms if relevant.

fields.name: Auxiliary
fields.description: One of: avoir / être / both / N/A.

fields.name: PastParticiple
fields.description: Past participle of the verb.

fields.name: AgreementNote
fields.description: Participle agreement or other important agreement note.

fields.name: Register
fields.description: One of: spoken / standard written / literary / formal / mixed.

fields.name: FrequencyTier
fields.description: One of: high / medium / literary.

fields.name: Mood
fields.description: Grammatical mood.

fields.name: Tense
fields.description: Grammatical tense or non-finite form name.

fields.name: Person
fields.description: Grammatical person label, or N/A for non-finite forms.

fields.name: SubjectFR
fields.description: Exact surface French subject, such as je, j’, tu, il, elle, on, nous, vous, ils, elles, or —.

fields.name: CorePromptEN
fields.description: Main natural English production prompt.

fields.name: CoreAnswerFR
fields.description: Main French answer as a natural sentence or phrase that realizes the exact target form.

fields.name: CoreAnswerIPA
fields.description: Broad Parisian IPA for the entire CoreAnswerFR.

fields.name: CorePronunciationNote
fields.description: Short practical pronunciation note.

fields.name: AlternateAcceptedAnswers
fields.description: Optional semicolon-separated alternate accepted answers; empty if none.

fields.name: IdiomPromptEN
fields.description: Optional English prompt for a genuine high-value idiom or chunk.

fields.name: IdiomAnswerFR
fields.description: Optional French answer for the idiom production card.

fields.name: IdiomAnswerIPA
fields.description: Optional broad Parisian IPA for IdiomAnswerFR.

fields.name: IdiomPronunciationNote
fields.description: Optional short practical pronunciation note for the idiom answer.

fields.name: FormPrompt
fields.description: Optional repair prompt for an irregular, confusable, or otherwise high-value isolated form.

fields.name: FormAnswerFR
fields.description: Optional isolated French form answer.

fields.name: FormAnswerIPA
fields.description: Optional broad Parisian IPA for FormAnswerFR.

fields.name: FormPronunciationNote
fields.description: Optional short practical pronunciation note for the isolated form.

fields.name: UsageNote
fields.description: Short note about use, nuance, style, or literary status.

fields.name: AudioFR
fields.description: Audio field; leave blank for now.
